text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, February 22. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Moonlight Sonata for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the grocery list ready. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
